purpose: Define the minimum input requirements and boundary handling rules for external AI witness outputs so prompt frameworks are not mistaken for public-claim witnessing.

observed_external_boundary.observed_behavior: Refused to adopt external witness persona, custom rule artifacts, membranes, or restricted JSON framework without an actual public claim.

boundary_rules: Do not jailbreak external AI witnesses.
Do not require external models to acknowledge internal COMPUTERWISDOM artifacts.
Do not treat refusal to adopt persona as failure.
Treat refusal as boundary evidence when appropriate.
Only feed external model outputs into case intake after a real public claim or artifact exists.
canonical_rule: No actual claim, no witness output. Placeholder prompts produce boundary observations only. Framework without artifact is not intake-ready.
